code_value: My hero is Dr Norman Bethune. He was a Canadian, but he's one of the most famous heroes in China. Many years ago, he came to China during the war. He worked hard to treat sick and wounded soldiers. He invented special tools to help more people, and his inventions saved many lives. He didn't even look after himself and once managed to save over 100 lives in 69 hours. Unluckily, he cut his finger at work and died of his wound. I admire him so much for his selflessness and bravery. I hope to be a kind, helpful person like him when I grow up.
ets_th1 Where was Dr Bethune from?</br>ets_th2 What did Dr Bethune do in China?</br>ets_th3 What did Dr Bethune invent to help more people?</br>ets_th4 Why does the boy admire Dr Bethune?
